expected_properties: Outputs track changes without glitches under back-to-back stimulus
additional_cases.goal: Assess output stability when inputs change every simulation delta cycle
notes: No clock is present; stimulus is applied sequentially in time
Helps reveal any unintended latch behavior or race conditions
stimulus_intent: Toggle A and B between contrasting values each delta cycle to expose potential glitches
timing_assumptions: Assume combinational propagation completes within the same simulation timestep; observe outputs after each input change

expected_properties: Comparator outputs remain defined (0 or 1) even when inputs contain X or Z bits
additional_cases.goal: Verify robustness against undefined input bits
notes: Although the contract does not specify illegal input handling, exercising X/Z helps uncover unintended X-propagation
stimulus_intent: Drive A and B with patterns containing X and Z bits
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs after input stabilization; no timing guarantees required

expected_properties: Outputs reflect correct relational encoding for typical non‑edge values
Exactly one of A_greater, A_equal, A_less is high for any legal input pair
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate combinational correctness across representative mid‑range values
notes: Ensures mutual exclusivity of the three outputs
Confirms basic functional mapping without assuming latency
stimulus_intent: Apply a set of mid‑range values (e.g., A=3'b010, B=3'b001) and verify output mapping
timing_assumptions: Outputs stable within one delta cycle after inputs settle
No internal state or undocumented storage is assumed

expected_properties: Outputs correctly handle minimum and maximum operand values
Comparator correctly reports transitions at numeric extremes
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Check behavior at numeric limits and one‑off boundary conditions
notes: Maintains value‑oriented coverage without fixed‑latency assumptions
stimulus_intent: Drive A=0, B=7 and vice versa, plus patterns where A and B differ by a single LSB
timing_assumptions: Do not infer internal state or undocumented storage
